ICO.name: Individual Contributor
ICO.responsibilities: Responsible for executing tasks with a short-term focus (daily to weekly) within their own area, following budget guidelines, and contributing to functional goals without direct managerial duties.

FLL.name: Front Line Leader
FLL.responsibilities: Responsible for coordinating the execution of operational goals with a medium-term focus (weekly to monthly) within a small area or department, managing operating costs, and overseeing one functional unit.

MLL.name: Mid-Level Leader
MLL.responsibilities: Responsible for aligning unit plans with organizational strategy with a long-term focus (1 year) within a small country, balancing revenue growth with cost management, and managing one or two closely related functions.

BUL.name: Business Unit Leader
BUL.responsibilities: Responsible for executing organizational strategy with a long-term focus (1-2 years) across an entire country or region, handling full P&L responsibilities, and overseeing multiple business functions.
